title: Chain Restaurant Calorie Posting Laws, Obesity, and Consumer Welfare
journal: Journal of the European Economic Association

data.sample_filter: (dccsa==1 | nyccsa==1 | seacsa==1 | philcsa==1 | albanymsa==1 | cd==1) & excluded!=1

analysis.legacy_reason: Requires Stata-based preprocessing (brfss_clean.do appends 19 BRFSS annual .dta files 1994-2012 with per-year BMI variable renaming, merges laws.dta + med_inc_updated.dta + unem_popdens.dta). Implemented in a custom R script (analysis_347.R). Template would need to rebuild brfss_clean_bmi.dta from scratch. Bundled results.csv (TWFE=-0.174 matching paper Table 3) retained.

original_result.source: Table 3, Column 1 (BMI, calorie posting laws). areg with county FE + monthly time FE + county-specific linear trends. N=594,364.

notes: CUSTOM SCRIPT (analysis_347.R). Data prep replicates brfss_clean.do: appends 19 BRFSS annual files (1994-2012), cleans BMI (different variable names per year: _bmi/_bmi2/_bmi3/_bmi4/_bmi5), constructs FIPS from state*1000+county, merges laws.dta + med_inc + unem_popdens. Sample: MSA counties around treated areas (DC/NYC/Seattle/Philadelphia/Albany CSAs + New England census division). Excludes CA, MA, NJ, ME, OR, Nassau Co NY, Davidson Co TN. TWFE EXACT MATCH: R=-0.1744 vs paper=-0.174. Monthly time (tt=(year-2001)*12+mo+84) with county-specific linear trends (fips[tt] in fixest). 89 counties, 26 treated. 4 yearly cohorts: 2008 (NYC), 2009 (Seattle+Westchester), 2010 (Philadelphia+Albany+Montgomery+Schenectady+Suffolk), 2011 (Vermont 14 counties). CS-DID uses yearly county-level panel (balanced, 44 of 89 counties); CS-NT=-0.448, CS-NYT=-0.439 — both ~2.5x TWFE magnitude, suggesting TWFE attenuation. Small cohort 2009 (2 treated counties after balancing → 1 with full panel) flagged by did package. Event study uses yearly relative time [-7, +4]. | AUDIT 2026-04-19: Paper-auditor EXACT (0.23%). Another LESSON 8 attenuation case (joining 253 Bancalari, 267 Bhalotra, 241 Soliman): TWFE -0.174 vs CS-NT -0.448 (2.5×), CS-NYT -0.439 (2.5×). TWFE attenuated toward zero by forbidden LvE/EvL comparisons from staggered cohorts 2008-2011 + trend controls. Direction unanimous. D-FRAGILE is design signal (first-period sign-reversed +0.105; avg breaks at Mbar=0.25) — not implementation. Custom estimator-row schema (3 rows: TWFE, CS-NT, CS-NYT); no Spec A computed.
